==Biography==
===2015 Preseason===
Rohit "'''CurryshotGG'''" Nathani played with [[Monstar Kittenz]] from August to November, but he left prior to the [[Riot League Championship Series/North America/2015 Season/Spring Expansion|expansion tournament]].

===2015 Season===
CurryshotGG then played with [[Escalate Legion Gaming]] briefly before deciding to focus on coaching. He coached [[Final Five]] briefly in January and February. After leaving Final Five, CurryshotGG joined [[Team Fusion]] as a coach in March 2015, and in April he became their head coach, and helped them reach the [[Riot League Championship Series/North America/2015 Season/Summer Promotion|2015 Summer Promotion Tournament]]. However, the team lost 3-2 to [[Team Dignitas]] and disbanded shortly after. CurryshotGG then joined [[Odyssey Gaming]] for the [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Summer Qualifier|NACS Summer Qualifier]], and moved to [[Team Imagine]] just before the [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Summer Playoffs|playoffs]] when the two teams merged. Imagine qualified for the [[League Championship Series/North America/2016 Season/Spring Promotion|2016 Spring Promotion Tournament]] but lost 3-1 to [[Team 8]].

== Trivia ==
* Jumped off the Andes mountains with a parachute.
* Spanish was his first language even though he is Indian.
* Likes to listen to classical music.
